rollup.session_summary: AgentArcade redesign: rewrote globals.css with @theme/@utility design system, refactored all 21 source files (10 components, 5 pages, 1 lib, 1 data file, 2 configs), removed shadcn/ui boilerplate/clsx/tailwind-merge/cn dependencies, deployed to Vercel production

decisions_made.rationale: Tailwind v4 @utility provides prototype-faithful naming (eyebrow, meta, pill, card, btn) without separate CSS files; generates at build time with zero runtime
Removed iconColor+initials pattern; inline SVGs in agent data for zero-dependency icon system
All class strings are now plain Tailwind utilities; cn()/clsx/tailwind-merge added complexity without value

open_blockers: ESLint v10 requires flat config format — next lint fails due to .eslintrc.json incompatibility; needs eslint.config.js migration
All data is static (agents.ts); needs API backend for real marketplace
next_session_priorities: 1. Fix ESLint config for v10 flat config format or downgrade ESLint to v9
3. Wire up real agent data from an API or database
4. Add loading states and error boundaries
